itemDescriptionEN: Essential FX Acyl-Glutathione Intensive Overnight Moisturizer
title: Essential FX Acyl-Glutathione Intensive Overnight Moisturizer - Anti-Aging Treatment
description: The Essential FX Acyl-Glutathione Intensive Overnight Moisturizer is a sumptuously rich nocturnal elixir. This deeply nourishing overnight treatment rejuvenates your skin while you sleep, enhancing texture, softening expression lines, and improving elasticity.Awaken to smoother, firmer, and more supple skin.Enriched with Acyl-Glutathione, a blend of three amino acids mirroring the body's primary antioxidant, glutathione, this moisturizer is a vital component of a comprehensive skincare routine. It combats the signs of wrinkles and creases, revitalizing fragile skin. Complementing this is our Vitamin F Blend, a harmonious infusion of flax, chia, and macadamia seed oils. These essential elements, not naturally found in our bodies, work tirelessly to restore suppleness and impart a healthy luminosity by deeply moisturizing and enhancing the skin's protective moisture barrier.
